## LLM Analysis

### Experiment H-006: dt Compression in Headless Sol-Core

This experiment investigates whether the time-to-failure compression observed in the dashboard is also present in the headless sol-core. The results show a monotonic relationship between dt and time-to-failure, with increasing dt values leading to faster failure times.

### Claim Implications

- **[ADD]** C-79: dt compression is present in headless sol-core, with increasing dt values leading to faster failure times.

### Open Question Updates

- **Q1** [partially_answered]: Experiment H-006 results show that dt compression is present in headless sol-core, but further investigation is needed to determine the extent of this effect.
